domain: Russian Cossack 5-sotnia × 100-Cossack regiment + 3-rank yesaul/sotnik/khorunzhii promotion ladder + multi-weapon (lance + shashka saber + 2 pistols + musket) drill + dzhigitovka horsemanship 5-stage skill-progression + 11-marksmen-per-sotnia specialist subset + stanitsa village + summer-camp Cossack-perfection + 19th-century Imperial Russian Army saber manual heritage
specific_mechanism: COSSACK-5-SOTNIA-100-COHORT-RANK-PROMOTION-MULTI-WEAPON-DRILL-TRAINING: hierarchical cohort training with (1) 5-sotnia × 100-cohort organization: 500 student-LLMs organized into 5 sotnias × 100 cohort-members; each sotnia trains as a unit; cross-sotnia comparison every K_compare steps; (2) 3-rank yesaul-sotnik-khorunzhii promotion ladder: each Cossack advances through 3 ranks gated by per-rank capability test C_R; only top-fraction promotes; (3) multi-weapon multi-skill progression: 4-weapon {lance=summarization, shashka=reasoning, pistol=quick-Q&A, musket=long-form-precision}; must master all 4 before rank-advancement; (4) 5-stage dzhigitovka skill-progression {saddle-stance → standing-vault → reverse-vault → standing-shoot → leaning-cut} capability-tiers basic→master; (5) 11-marksmen-per-sotnia specialist subset: 11/100 per sotnia trained as specialists (rare-case high-precision domain), 11% specialist fraction. Differs from R508 PENCAK-SILAT-6-GRADE-PROMOTION (6-grade promotion-criterion + kuda-kuda foundation + madya teaching-rights G_5 self-distillation chain + stance-distribution gating per grade) and R533 RADIF-7-DASTGAH-GUSHE (7+5 dastgāh + 30-50 gushe + maktab K-cohort + single-passage + bedāheh gate) by 5-sotnia × 100-cohort organization + 3-rank promotion ladder + 4-weapon multi-skill + 5-stage dzhigitovka + 11% specialist subset.
